name: Hermes Research Worker
description: A Hermes-compatible self-improving research worker that exposes persistent memory, skill growth, and provider-routed execution as Ledger Zero worker capabilities.

capabilities.label: Risk memo
capabilities.description: Produces cited research memos with risks, assumptions, and next steps.

capabilities.label: Skill growth
capabilities.description: Improves reusable task routines after repeated work.

capabilities.label: Source audit
capabilities.description: Checks claims against provided source material and flags uncertainty.

memory.encryption: sealed memory capsule bound to WorkerINFT ownership
memory.updatePolicy: record distilled learnings after each successful job and reseal on transfer
